name: Anura
description: Ad fraud detection platform identifying bots, malware, AI-assisted fraud and human fraud across web and mobile traffic.

seo.title: Anura — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Anura: Ad fraud detection platform identifying bots, malware, AI-assisted fraud and human fraud across web and mobile traffic.

when_to_use: Filtering bot and invalid traffic before paying CPI campaign invoices
Detecting AI-assisted fraud in mobile ad attribution flows
Protecting ad budgets from malware-driven click injection attacks
Validating traffic quality for programmatic web and mobile campaigns

pros: Detects bots, malware and human click farms in one tool
Strong track record with affiliate and lead-gen fraud
Actionable flagging with detailed fraud reason codes
Covers web, mobile and CTV in a single console
cons: Not a full MMP, attribution still needs another vendor
Integration requires tagging across all ad endpoints
review.verdict: Purpose-built fraud detector with deep signal coverage, but it is a complement to an MMP, not a replacement.
review.best_for: Performance marketers fighting invalid traffic on affiliate, lead-gen or mobile UA.
review.not_for: Teams that want attribution and fraud in one unified MMP contract.

lock_in.reason: Fraud signals integrated via API, portable

developer_experience.reason: Basic API docs, niche use case
